name: simbascribe
description: Self-hostable team memory + a thin, self-maintaining todo tracker for a team that lives in Discord.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc && cp -f src/db/schema.sql dist/db/schema.sql && cp -f src/tracker/schema.sql dist/tracker/schema.sql && cp -f src/profile/system-prompt.skeleton.txt dist/profile/system-prompt.skeleton.txt && cp -f src/profile/tracker-prompt.skeleton.txt dist/profile/tracker-prompt.skeleton.txt
